LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONERS MARIA PENARANDA AND MARK CORNANDER'S PETITION TO CONFIRM FINAL ARBITRATION AWARD FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS IS OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEPARTMENT 302. THE MATTER SHOULD BE RE-SET IN DEPARTMENT 501, THE REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING COURT. (SEE SF LOCAL RULE 8.10.) JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976. (302)

DEPT. 501: PETITIONERS MARIA PENARANDA AND MARK CORNANDER'S PETITION TO CONFIRM FINAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED. FINAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONFIRMED. REQUEST FOR FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,700. JUDGE: RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D501)
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 55559105) FILED BY PETITIONER PENARANDA, MARIA ELENA CORNANDER, MARK

POS OF: PETITION TO CONFIRM FINAL ARB AWARD AND FOR ATTNY FEES AND COSTS; NTC OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM FINAL ARB AWARD AND FOR ATTNY FEES AND COSTS; MEMO OF P&A IN SUPPORT; DEC OF THOMAS W. CHAFFEE IN SUPPORT; PROPOSED ORDER; PROPOSED JUDGMENT; SUMNS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER PENARANDA, MARIA ELENA CORNANDER, MARK RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT ROWE, JONAS $13,315.89 ATTORNEY FEES, $4,050.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,365.89, RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO IMMEDIATELY REMOVE HIS POSSESSION FROM THE GARAGE AT 1800 LAGUNA STREET AND 1880-1884 BUSH STREET, SF, CA. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award And For Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Aug-19-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Thomas W. Chaffee, Esq. of Morris Polich & Purdy, LLP (415-984-8534), counsel for plaintiff/moving party
No Appearance, no opposition by defendant(s)

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONERS MARIA PENARANDA and MARK CORNANDER's Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award And For Attorney Fees And Costs is GRANTED. Final Arbitration award is confirmed. Request for fees and costs incurred in conjunction with this action is granted in the amount of $1,700. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jul-22-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PETITIONERS MARIA PENARANDA and MARK CORNANDER'S Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award For Attorneys Fees And Costs is Off calendar as to Department 302. The matter should be re-set in Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court. (See SF Local Rule 8.10.) Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
